name: sbom emits a CycloneDX bill of materials with the declared-dependency component inventory
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'format=cyclonedx components=2' e.txt && echo h15-cyclonedx 1>&2
